title: uragoga suffruticosa
intro: Uragoga suffruticosa, also known as Uragoga suffruticosa, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of shrub native to tropical Africa, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its ability to reduce fever, ease pain, and treat various health conditions. Uragoga suffruticosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in some traditional remedies to help manage conditions such as malaria, fever, and digestive issues.
